title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Ujiarpur
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Ujiarpur assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Ujiarpur
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Ujiarpur assembly segment.

title: High stakes battle in Ujiarpur as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Ujiarpur. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Flood protection works in Ujiarpur inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Ujiarpur.

title: Women voters of Ujiarpur demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Ujiarpur has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.
